steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The first sentence establishes a correlation: diverse behaviors correlate with larger brains. The blank must signal that the second sentence — simple behaviors should require fewer brain resources — is a logical consequence of this relationship.

steps.title: Match the causal transition
steps.content: ”Thus” means “therefore,” signaling a logical consequence. This correctly bridges the stated correlation (diverse behaviors correlate with larger brains) to the inference (simple behaviors require fewer brain resources). The other choices express temporal order (“Subsequently”), addition (“Besides”), or contrast (“Nevertheless”) instead. That matches choice D — D is correct.
